hypotheses: EXISTENCE : ex (fun n : nat => P n)
obligation.goal:
ex
  (fun n : nat =>
   and (P n)
     (NW
        (fun MIN : unit =>
         match MIN with
         | tt => forall (m : nat) (_ : P m), ge m n
         end)))

attempts:
destruct EXISTENCE as (n, Hn). pattern n; apply (Nat.lt_wf_ind n); clear n; intros n IH Hn. destruct (classic (exists m, m < n /\ P m)) as [(m, (Hm1, Hm2))|H].
- exact (IH m Hm1 Hm2).
- exists n; split; [exact Hn | unfold NW; intros m Hpm; apply (Nat.le_of_not_lt m n); intro Hlt; apply H; exists m; split; auto].

destruct (Coq.Arith.Wf_nat.exists_minimal P EXISTENCE) as [n [Hn Hmin]]. unfold NW. exists n. split.
- exact Hn.
- exact (fun m Hm => not_lt m n (fun Hlt => Hmin m Hlt Hm)).

apply ex_min in EXISTENCE. destruct EXISTENCE as [n [Hn Hmin]]. exists n. split.
- exact Hn.
- simpl. intros m Hm. apply le_of_not_lt. intro Hlt. exact (Hmin m Hlt Hm).
destruct (ex_min P EXISTENCE) as [n [Hn Hmin]]. exists n; split; [exact Hn | intros m Hm; omega].
failed_attempts:
destruct EXISTENCE as (n, Hn). pattern n; apply (Nat.lt_wf_ind n); clear n; intros n IH Hn. destruct (classic (exists m, m < n /\ P m)) as [(m, (Hm1, Hm2))|H].
- exact (IH m Hm1 Hm2).
- exists n; split; [exact Hn | unfold NW; intros m Hpm; apply (Nat.le_of_not_lt m n); intro Hlt; apply H; exists m; split; auto].

destruct (Coq.Arith.Wf_nat.exists_minimal P EXISTENCE) as [n [Hn Hmin]]. unfold NW. exists n. split.
- exact Hn.
- exact (fun m Hm => not_lt m n (fun Hlt => Hmin m Hlt Hm)).

apply ex_min in EXISTENCE. destruct EXISTENCE as [n [Hn Hmin]]. exists n. split.
- exact Hn.
- simpl. intros m Hm. apply le_of_not_lt. intro Hlt. exact (Hmin m Hlt Hm).
destruct (ex_min P EXISTENCE) as [n [Hn Hmin]]. exists n; split; [exact Hn | intros m Hm; omega].

visualization:
* (2 HYPS)|-ex
  (fun n : nat =>
   and (P n)
     (NW
        (fun MIN : unit =>
         match MIN with
         | tt => forall (m : nat) (_ : P m), ge m n
         end))) (cost:0.0; n_fail:2)
